ingredients_text: Tikka Masala Sauce (58%) [Water, Onions, Quorn Pieces (22%) (Mycoprotein*, Rehydrated Free Range Egg White, Natural Flavouring, Firming Agents: Calcium Chloride, Calcium Acetate), Single Cream (Milk), Tomato Paste, Rapeseed Oil, Garlic Purée, Sugar, Cornflour, Ginger Purée, Tapioca Starch, Tandoori Masala Seasoning (Paprika, Salt, Coriander, Turmeric, Chilli Powder, Cumin, Cinnamon, Cloves, Natural Flavouring, Black Pepper, Bay Leaf, Colour: Paprika Extract; Sunflower Oil), Coriander, Paprika Powder, Ground Coriander, Ground Cumin, Turmeric, Cumin Seeds, Ground Cardamom, Chilli Powder, Colour: Paprika Extract; Salt], Cooked Pilau Rice (42%) (Water, Basmati Rice, Onions, Rapeseed Oil, Salt, Turmeric, Cumin Seeds). *12% of product. ALLERGY ADVICE: For allergens see ingredients in bold. May also contain Wheat.
